title: Temp Residue Owner V1
description: Schema for temp_residue_owner/v1 ownership marker files placed inside a repo-approved temporary root (tmp/, .claude/tmp/) session subdirectory. A valid marker is advisory only: it is used by temp_residue_classifier.py to distinguish an agent-owned session subdirectory from unowned residue, so the classifier can suggest recommendation=eligible_for_delete instead of report_only. A valid marker is NEVER deletion authorization by itself — a separate deletion executor (out of scope for this schema) must re-verify ownership, Git state, and path containment immediately before any destructive operation. This document implements the accidental-isolation threat model only: it protects against unintentional cross-agent deletion within the same OS user, not against an adversarial process on the same host.
